text: So today we are on strike because Starbucks has refused to negotiate and bargain in good faith with us, and not just us. Starbucks workers united nationally. Even for me, like I see how hard my baristas work, and they're getting paid like fifteen. There's no way they, the amount of stress, especially with these staffing levels, does not, like, it's not something that's survivable. I've worked here for four years, and I've struggled all four years working here still, and nothing has become better for the work conditions. For all things are always breaking down. We have low staff. We aren't paid as well as you know that we should be getting paid, and our hours are getting cut. Double union busters, we've got trouble. Double union busters, we've got trouble. Double union busters.
